events.title: Building for Everyone: How Accessibility is Shaping the Future of AI
events.description: For 30+ years, Microsoft and the disability community have driven accessible tech. Many everyday innovations began as disability solutions. Now AI opens new possibilities—from Seeing AI to inclusive dev tools—if we build it right.
events.speaker: Simi Bajaj, Cloud Solution Architect UK MW, Microsoft

events.title: Windows – The secure AI platform for work
events.description: Explore how Windows powers secure, AI-driven productivity—from Copilot+ PCs to Windows 365 for agents—built for scalable, resilient, and intelligent work.
events.speaker: Aleksandar Bozadzhiev, Senior Product Manager, Microsoft

events.title: Building Your AI Tour Concierge Agent: From London to the World
events.description: In this session, we will build a Global AI Tour Concierge Agent that helps attendees explore sessions across multiple AI Tour cities, starting in London. By using Microsoft Foundry, MCP, GitHub CLI, and Microsoft Learn, we will create an agent that answers questions and recommends learning resources.
events.speaker: Nicholas Chang, Senior Platform Engineer, Kainos

events.title: Turning AI Potential into High-Impact AI Business Cases and ROI
events.description: Discover Microsoft's high-impact AI Value Framework to build outcome-driven business cases. Drive ROI via time savings, error reduction, throughput, revenue growth, and cost avoidance.
events.speaker: Jon Champman, Solution Engineering Director, Microsoft

events.title: Prototype agents with the AI toolkit and Model Context Protocol
events.description: Learn how to build a conversational AI agent in VS Code using the AI toolkit, Microsoft Foundry and the Model Context Protocol (MCP). You'll explore and compare models to find the best fit for your agent, configure its instructions and enable sales analysis and product inventory management.
events.speaker: Korey Stegared-Pace, Senior Cloud Advocate, Microsoft

events.title: Scaling AI with Purpose: A Human-Centered Approach
events.description: Learn how frontier firms can adopt AI with purpose and empathy. This session introduces tools and frameworks to identify user scenarios, validate solutions, embed feedback, align leadership, and drive change through a human-centered lens.
events.speaker: Jo Johnstone, Copilot - Cloud Solution Architect, Microsoft

events.title: Unify and activate your data for AI innovation
events.description: Learn how Microsoft helps businesses modernize data for AI. Discover key challenges to AI readiness and how to unify, transform, and govern data for smarter insights.
events.speaker: Ayeshna Jacob, UK&I Data & Analytics GTM Lead, Microsoft

events.title: AI, agents and skilling for nonprofit acceleration
events.description: Explore how AI, agents, and automation are empowering and future-proofing nonprofit teams worldwide. Through real-world examples, case studies, and agent-building demos.
events.speaker: Dan I'Anson, Head of Digital, Data and Technology, Scope; Clint Conlin, Microsoft Elevate; Charles Eales, Microsoft

events.title: AI for Impact: Transforming Health, Education, and Public Services
events.description: AI is accelerating life-saving breakthroughs, transforming healthcare experiences, and enabling governments and educators to deliver more secure, personalized, and equitable services.
events.speaker: Kees Hertogh, VP Marketing Public Sector & Healthcare, Microsoft; Cormac Breen, Guy's and St Thomas' NHS; Sarah Mackenzie, St. Piran's School; Pete Lloyd, Lancashire County Council

events.title: AI-ready for defense and intelligence missions
events.description: Explore how AI is transforming human-machine collaboration in defense. This session highlights real-world applications—from autonomous systems to mission planning.
events.speaker: Gus Macgregor-Millar, General Manager Defense & Intelligence, Microsoft

events.title: Pioneering the future of financial services with AI
events.description: Explore how financial institutions are transforming with AI—from boosting productivity with Copilot and agents, to accelerating innovation through Azure AI.
events.speaker: Simon Bullers, CTO Bank of England; Dave Collier, Microsoft UK Financial Services; Bill Borden, Corp VP Microsoft; Emily Prince, LSEG; Will Hyams, Howden Group

events.title: Unleash creativity with AI
events.description: Discover how media leaders are using agentic AI to empower creators, streamline workflows, and unlock monetization—and why today's AI decisions will shape tomorrow's competitive edge.
events.speaker: TBA

events.title: Unlock AI innovation and agility in Retail and Consumer Goods

events.title: Fast data transformation in Fabric with OneLake and the Data Wrangler
events.description: See how multi-cloud OneLake shortcuts connect to data sources without duplication, run shortcut file transforms and AI transforms like summarisation and PII detection.

events.description: DevOps isn't starting over. It's leveling up on platforms like GitHub, where AI and automation redefine how teams build software.

events.description: See how GitHub Copilot exhibits agent-like behavior in real dev workflows, planning, executing multi-step tasks, and integrating deeply into engineering processes.
